expectations.text: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
expectations.evidence: Single dashboard.html, Chart.js via CDN only.

expectations.text: Includes KPI cards for at least 4 of: Total Revenue, Gross Profit, Marketing Spend, CAC, Active Customers
expectations.evidence: 6 KPI cards present including all 5 required metrics plus a derived revenue-per-customer card.

expectations.text: Includes a 12-month trend chart (line) plotting revenue and at least one other metric (COGS or gross profit) by month
expectations.evidence: Verified directly: 'const months' array has 12 entries (Jan-Dec), 'const revenue' array has 12 matching values, line chart plots Revenue and COGS datasets against these labels.

expectations.text: Includes a region breakdown visualization (chart or table) showing North America, APAC, Europe, and LATAM
expectations.evidence: Donut chart + ranked bar list with all 4 regions (North America, APAC, Europe, LATAM).

expectations.text: Monthly chart data point count matches the 12 months present in the source workbook
expectations.evidence: months/revenue/cogs arrays each contain exactly 12 entries matching the 12-row source table, values match source exactly (e.g. 610000 for Jan).

expectations.text: Numeric KPI values are human-formatted (e.g. $13.7M) rather than raw unformatted numbers (e.g. 13700000)
expectations.evidence: KPI values shown as '$13.7M' etc; zero raw unformatted 7+ digit numbers found in output.
